svg.title: Taskmail system architecture
svg.desc: System architecture diagram for Taskmail showing Gmail push notifications flowing through Google Pub/Sub to a Hono API server, which calls Gemini AI and stores data in Neon Postgres, displayed on a Next.js frontend.

g.text: Dashboard · Task manager · Daily briefing · Manual task form

svg.text: dashed line = Pub/Sub push trigger to /api/gmail/webhook
gray line = GitHub Actions scheduled jobs (daily cron)
